title: Resolution Expressing Sincerest Appreciation and Deepest Gratitude of the Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños to the People of Barangays Sapang, Habagatan and Pinagdilawan of Talim Island, Headed by Their Honorable Punong Barangays, Hon. Jeovilo D. Celoza, Hon. Juan L. Dondoy, Hon. Ohgie O. Pundamiera, Respectively, for Their Help and Assistance in Retrieval Operations for the Bodies of Richard Gaylon, Renato Gaylon and John Lourence Escala Who Died in a Boat Accident on May 1, 2021. (author: Counci
